---
name: Requirement
about: Create a requirement
title: "[REQ] "
labels: requirement
---
## Requirement
### Statement
Short, clear statement of what is needed.
Ex. Indicators showing errors or faults shall be some share of red in color.

### Rationale
Why does this exist? User desired? Standard?
Ex. This adheres to ISO 3864 / ISO 7010

### Guidance
Any needed context for the statement.
Ex. The indicator is allowed to have additional colors to provide style (e.g. red circle with white X).

### Exception
Any exceptions to the requirement text? This should be used sparingly and more explicit requirements should be written.
Ex. Faults related bad quality do not apply.

---

## User Story
As a [user], I want [goal], so that [benefit].
Ex. As a user, I want to have an easy overview of the status and indications to easily see faults, so that issues can be easily identified and resolved quickly.

---

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Condition 1
- [ ] Condition 2
- [ ] Condition 3

---

## Notes / Constraints
Only include if something is important for implementation:
- Performance constraint
- Security requirement
- External dependency
- Edge cases

---
